title: melica porteri
intro: Melica porteri, also known as Porter's melica, is a perennial grass native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Melica porteri include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Melica porteri can be dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in tinctures and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
